ExperienceName.title: ExperienceName
ExperienceName.description: This will be the experience name that is used to determine which experience is being targeted.

Range_Begin_Date.title: Range_Begin_Date
Range_Begin_Date.description: The start of the date range used to determine which sessions to check. It is ok if the date range is a single day.

Range_End_Date.title: Range_End_Date
Range_End_Date.description: The end of the date range used to determine which sessions to check. It is ok if the date range is a single day.
